ideation: This sequence simulates holding a microphone and speaking. The right arm will hold the microphone, and the left will be in a relaxed position. I will make use of the examples to ensure smooth transitions. The first frame will start with the right arm slightly raised and angled towards the mouth. The left arm remains relaxed. In the second frame, the right arm will move slightly forward, as if the robot is beginning to speak. In the third frame, the right arm will return to the original position, and the left arm will raise slightly, creating a more dynamic pose. In the fourth frame, the right arm will move slightly forward again, as if emphasizing a point. In the fifth frame, both arms will return to their neutral positions.

frames.beat: right arm lifts, holding an imaginary microphone
speaking begins, the mic moves slightly forward
left arm gestures, right arm holds steady
emphasizing a point, the mic moves forward again
both arms return to a resting position
